price: daß mein Herr mir vergeben und mich zu den Geehrten hat gehören lassen!
arabic: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِي رَبِّي وَجَعَلَنِي مِنَ ٱلۡمُكۡرَمِينَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: bimā ghafara lī rabbī wajaʿalanī mina al-muk'ramīna
